game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **RPG クリスタルオーサ (Crystal Osa)**: Players navigate a 2D pixel-art world with a party of up to four characters, moving via a virtual D-pad or touch-to-move, engaging in turn-based command battles initiated by enemy encounters. During combat, players tap on screen buttons to select actions like Attack, Skill, Item, or Defend for each character, managing HP and MP. The "Skill Set System" allows each character to equip 5 active skills from their learned repertoire, while the character Murushuma can use a "Learning" command to acquire enemy abilities. Progression involves gaining experience points from winning battles to level up characters, increasing stats and unlocking new skills, and crafting equipment by collecting 'Ores' from dungeons and bringing them to specific alchemy workshops. The game's difficulty scales with stronger enemies and more complex boss mechanics, with the objective being to complete the linear story, and failure occurring if all party members are defeated in battle.
game_info.description: RPG Crystal Osa is a turn-based RPG where you lead a party of heroes through dungeons filled with monsters. Battle enemies to gain experience, level up your characters, and learn new skills. Collect Ores from defeated enemies to craft powerful equipment. Your goal is to defeat the final boss on floor 5. If all party members fall in battle, it's game over.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menus, select battle actions, move in dungeons
Space: Confirm selection, advance dialogue
Shift: Cancel, go back in menus
Z: Open party menu (during dungeon exploration)
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (return to start screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic movement and menu navigation. Validates that the player can move through dungeons and access menus without errors.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move randomly through the dungeon, trigger battles, and use basic attack commands. Navigate through menus to verify UI responsiveness.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The game should handle all inputs gracefully without crashes. Movement, battles, and menu navigation should work correctly throughout the test.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the optimal strategy to win the game by defeating the final boss. Validates that the win condition is properly triggered.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Efficiently navigate through all floors, engage in strategic battles using skills and items, level up characters, and defeat the final boss. Prioritize healing and skill usage to minimize losses.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The test should reach floor 5, defeat the final boss, and trigger the GAME_OVER_WIN state. The game should display the victory screen with final stats.
